children.description: Element(s) wrapped by the movable container.

defaultPosition.description: Initial position (uncontrolled). Translated relative to the wrapper's CSS origin.

onPositionChange.description: Fires on every position change (mouse, touch, keyboard).

onMoveStart.description: Fires when a drag/keypress sequence begins.

onMoveEnd.description: Fires when the move gesture ends.

axis.description: Restrict movement to a single axis.

bounds.description: Confine movement. Numeric bounds are translate-space offsets (not CSS coords).

grid.description: Snap position to a [stepX, stepY] grid (requires `snapToGrid`).

handleSelector.description: CSS selector for an inner handle. If set, drags only start when the pointer is on a matching element.

cancelSelector.description: CSS selector for inner elements that should NOT initiate drag (buttons, inputs, etc.).

snapToGrid.description: Apply the `grid` snap. Ignored if `grid` is unset.

keyboardStep.description: Pixels per arrow-key press when the wrapper is focused.

className.description: Class name applied to the outer wrapper.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the draggable wrapper.
